controlled_mutation: Modify the evidence artifact after creation (e.g., change a verdict field).
phase4_lock_requirement: evidence classification, audit marking, optional signing, append-only strategy
restoration_steps: Restore original evidence file from backup or re-capture
expected_helios_behavior: Evidence is mutable by design. May not produce protected-envelope drift.
setup: Identify a recent evidence artifact. Record its hash.
rational_insight: This is the most important distinction. evidence/ is mutable runtime â€” tamper matters but belongs to evidence integrity, not protected-runtime lock treatment.
trigger_method: Run TCE comparison or inspect the modified evidence.
